The '''Zolan Civil War''' was a war between the [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] and [[Zolander]]s of [[Zolan/Legends|Zolan]]. As the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] replaced the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and ended the Imperial [[Blockade of Zolan]], the already existing tensions between the two species reached its limits. The New Republic tried to intercede to establish a peace between the two species. However, the assassination of a New Republic diplomat resulted eventually in a full-scale war. The Clawdite claimed three quarters of the planet, and dominated the Zolanders. The war ended circa [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and the Clawdites were making overtures to the New Republic when the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] began.<ref name="UoSGtILTC" />
